DataType.Name: PIA_Machine
DataType.Description: these variables are used by the machine (process) to interface with PIA

Member.Name: Alarm_Clear_All_PB
Member.Description: Clear All PIA Alarms PB

Member.Name: Alarm_Mc_State
Member.Description: State that the PLC was in when alarmed.

Member.Name: Alarm_Message
Member.Description: Alarm message.

Member.Name: Alarm_Message_Trigger
Member.Description: Alarm trigger.

Member.Name: Alarm_Pia_State
Member.Description: State that the PIA application was in when alarmed.

Member.Name: CloseAssy_Complete
Member.Description: Close Assy step Complete Status (1 = step complete)

Member.Name: Data_PPC
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives Pre-Process Check Data from this tag.

Member.Name: Data_Setup
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives Setup Data from this tag.

Member.Name: Data_SOB
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives Start of Build Data from this tag.

Member.Name: Data_Trace
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives Trace Data from this tag.

Member.Name: Exc_Rej
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives exception information related to Rejects from this tag.

Member.Name: Initialized
Member.Description: PLC and PIA application have been initialized.

Member.Name: MatlArrived_Complete
Member.Description: Material Arrived Step Complete Status (1 = step complete)

Member.Name: Perm_Close_Rqst
Member.Description: Close Assembly Permissive From Machine.

Member.Name: Perm_Logoff
Member.Description: Logoff Permissive From Machine.

Member.Name: Perm_Precheck_Rqst
Member.Description: Precheck Permissive From Machine

Member.Name: Perm_Setup_From_Req
Member.Description: PIA is requesting to send Setup data to the PLC

Member.Name: Perm_Setup_To_Req
Member.Description: PIA is requesting Setup data from the PLC

Member.Name: Perm_Trav_Req
Member.Description: Traveler Request Permissive From Machine

Member.Name: Perm_Trav_SOB_Atlas_Req
Member.Description: Start of build request for Atlas Laser Marker Permissive

Member.Name: Perm_Trav_SOB_Req
Member.Description: Start of Build Request Permissive

Member.Name: PPC_Complete
Member.Description: Preprocess Check Complete Status (1 = results are ready)

Member.Name: PPC_Fail
Member.Description: Results of the pre-process check have yielded a fail (1 = Fail)

Member.Name: PPC_Pass
Member.Description: Results of the pre-process check have yielded a pass (1 = Pass)

Member.Name: Setup_Complete
Member.Description: Setup Step Complete Status (1 = step complete)

Member.Name: Signoff_Complete
Member.Description: Signoff step Complete Status (1 = results are ready)

Member.Name: Signoff_Fail
Member.Description: Signoff Failed (1 = Failed)

Member.Name: Signoff_Pass
Member.Description: Signoff Passed (1 = Passed)

Member.Name: Signoff_Rwk_Pass
Member.Description: Passed Rework Signoff (1 = Passed)

Member.Name: SOB_Complete
Member.Description: Start Of Build Step Complete Status (1 = step complete)

Member.Name: SoB_Trav_Qty
Member.Description: start of build traveler quantity

Member.Name: Trav_Numbers
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receiveds traveler numbers from this tag.

Member.Name: Trav_Qty
Member.Description: Machine Code sends/receives Traveler number qty from this tag.

Member.Name: Trans_In_Process
Member.Description: Pia Transaction Status (on = In Process)
